title: Paris, Normandy & Loire Valley Discovery.

trains.name: Trains & Taxi Transfers
trains.blurb: Scheduled trains between cities with private taxi transfers at each end.

transport.1: Paris airport to Paris hotel private transfer.
transport.8: Paris hotel to Paris airport private transfer.

inclusions: Paris airport to Paris hotel private transfer on arrival
Train tickets Paris–Bayeux, Bayeux–Tours and Tours–Paris, 2nd class
Local taxi transfers between each train station and hotel
Paris hotel to Paris airport private transfer on departure

selfdrive.name: Self Drive
selfdrive.blurb: Rental car for the full itinerary — drive Normandy's D-Day beaches and the Loire Valley chateaux at your own pace.

transport.1: Paris airport to Paris hotel private transfer, then pick up rental car (SUV class, 5-seat, automatic) in Paris.
transport.3: Self-drive from Paris to Bayeux through the Normandy countryside.
transport.5: Self-drive from Bayeux to Tours via the Loire Valley.
transport.7: Self-drive from Tours back to Paris.
transport.8: Return the rental car and private transfer from the Paris hotel to the airport.

inclusions: Paris airport to Paris hotel private transfer on arrival
Rental car, SUV class 5-seat, automatic, for the duration of the tour
Self-guided route notes for Normandy and the Loire Valley
Car drop-off and airport transfer on departure

private.name: Private Exclusive Coach
private.blurb: Private coach with driver throughout — ideal for exploring Normandy's D-Day sites and the Loire Valley chateaux at an easy pace.

transport.1: Paris airport to Paris hotel private transfer. Private coach on disposal from Day 1 through Day 7.
transport.2: Paris city tour with local guide, 3 hrs, followed by a 1-hour Seine river cruise.
transport.3: Private coach transfer from Paris to Bayeux through the Normandy countryside.
transport.5: Private coach transfer from Bayeux to Tours via the Loire Valley.
transport.7: Private coach transfer from Tours back to Paris.
transport.8: Paris hotel to Paris airport private transfer.

inclusions: Private coach on disposal from Day 1 to Day 7
Paris airport–hotel private transfers on arrival and departure
Paris city tour with local guide, 3 hrs

days.title: Arrive Paris
days.desc: Arrive into Paris, the City of Light, and transfer to your hotel. Depending on arrival time, take a first stroll along the Champs-Élysées or beside the Seine near Notre-Dame.
days.taste: A classic Parisian bistro dinner with a glass of Bordeaux to mark the start of the trip.

days.title: Paris
days.desc: A full day discovering Paris: climb the Eiffel Tower, wander the Louvre's galleries, and take in Notre-Dame and the Île de la Cité. In the afternoon, a leisurely cruise along the Seine passes many of the city's illuminated landmarks.
days.experience: A one-hour Seine river cruise past the Eiffel Tower, Musée d'Orsay and Notre-Dame.
days.shopping: The grand boulevards around the Opéra Garnier, including the Galeries Lafayette department store.

days.title: Paris → Bayeux
days.desc: Travel west into Normandy to Bayeux, the first town liberated after D-Day. See the 11th-century Bayeux Tapestry, an extraordinary 70-metre embroidered chronicle of the Norman conquest of England, and the twin-spired Bayeux Cathedral.
days.taste: Normandy specialities on arrival — Camembert cheese, cider and Calvados brandy.

days.title: Normandy landing beaches
days.desc: A day to explore the D-Day landing beaches nearby: Omaha Beach, the shattered German gun emplacements at Pointe du Hoc, and the Normandy American Cemetery overlooking the Channel at Colleville-sur-Mer.
days.fallbackIncluded: Day at leisure — optional D-Day beaches and landing museums tour available.

days.title: Bayeux → Tours
days.desc: Head south into the Loire Valley, France's 'Garden of France', renowned for its Renaissance chateaux and vineyards, arriving in Tours on the banks of the Loire river.
days.taste: A Loire Valley wine tasting along the way — Vouvray or Chinon.

days.title: Loire Valley chateaux
days.desc: A day among the Loire chateaux: the river-spanning Château de Chenonceau, Leonardo da Vinci's final home at Amboise, and the formal Renaissance gardens of Villandry.
days.fallbackIncluded: Day at leisure — optional Loire Valley chateaux tour available.

days.title: Tours → Paris
days.desc: Return to Paris for a final night, with time to revisit favourite corners of the city or explore neighbourhoods not yet seen, such as Montmartre and the Sacré-Cœur.
days.shopping: The Marais district for boutiques, vintage shops and galleries.

days.title: Depart Paris
days.desc: Free time until your transfer to the airport, depending on flight time.

about.title: Best season
about.body: May–September for warm weather and long days; spring is especially good for the Loire Valley's gardens.

about.title: Weather
about.body: Temperate, 15–25°C in summer; cooler and wetter along the Normandy coast year-round.

about.title: Currency & docs
about.body: Euro (€) throughout France; standard EU/Schengen entry rules apply for non-EU visitors.

goodToKnow.title: Tickets & timing
goodToKnow.body: Book the Bayeux Tapestry and Château de Chenonceau ahead in peak summer months — both are popular and queues build quickly by mid-morning.

goodToKnow.title: Driving
goodToKnow.body: France drives on the right. Tolls apply on the autoroutes between Paris, Normandy and the Loire — keep a card handy for the péage booths.

goodToKnow.title: Rail travel
goodToKnow.body: Seat reservations are included on the Paris–Bayeux–Tours routes; keep tickets to hand for conductor checks.

goodToKnow.title: Your vehicle
goodToKnow.body: Driver working hours are limited by law to around 10 hrs per day — the Normandy and Loire transfer days are planned around this.

goodToKnow.title: What to pack
goodToKnow.body: Comfortable shoes for cobbled town centres and the D-Day beach paths; a light rain layer for Normandy in any season.

goodToKnow.title: Money
goodToKnow.body: Cards are widely accepted; keep some cash for smaller cafés and rural chateaux ticket offices. Tipping is appreciated but not obligatory.

terms: All rates are net and per person for the package.
Child rates apply for children aged 2 to 11 years old. One child sharing a room with 2 adults, subject to hotel policy.
All rates are subject to availability at the time of booking. Europe Incoming will endeavour to match the rates quoted.
Rates are not applicable during trade fair periods, major European public holidays, and other major events.
City taxes are not included in the price.
If certain attractions are closed during specific periods, alternative options will be arranged.
All bookings must be confirmed at least 60 working days prior to arrival.
100% pre-payment required by bank transfer or credit card (Visa or Mastercard). All bank transfer charges covered by the Agent.
Vouchers will be issued after receipt of full payment.
